title: Expect 100-continue, Early Responses, Body Rejection, and Draining · Contract Triage
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective expectation and early-response coordination state machine; retain the raw transcript, isolate the first divergent state, and preserve a regression corpus entry. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in expectation and early-response coordination state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Parse Expect, support 100-continue deliberately, and return appropriate final failure for unsupported expectations.
Send 100 Continue only after header-level policy accepts receiving content and before a final response commits.
Bound client waiting for 100, handle early final responses, and avoid sending content after rejection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Expectation Grammar Policy
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug protocol team handles case 1863 in a fuzzing harness varying every legal input segmentation. Build deterministic Go evidence to coordinate 100-continue and bounded early rejection without deadlock or unsafe reuse; preserve this operating constraint: the maintained Go protocol stack remains the production transfer target; then minimize a fuzz failure and add it to the deterministic regression corpus. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Parse Expect, support 100-continue deliberately, and return appropriate final failure for unsupported expectations.

Inspect the Expectation Grammar Policy trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Expectation Grammar Policy.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Expectation Grammar Policy, keep Expectation Grammar Policy connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Expect Deadlock Proof
